versions.headline: Software Engineering Manager | Full-Stack & Cloud Architecture
versions.summary: Applying the Wharton Executive Summary positioning framework, Ali Test is a results-driven Software Engineering Manager with 5 years of full-stack engineering experience at high-growth Saudi fintech startups, delivering scalable cloud-native solutions across React, Node.js, Python, and AWS. Demonstrated ability to architect, build, and ship production-grade systems that drive measurable business outcomes in regulated financial environments. Seeking to bring hands-on technical leadership and a startup execution mindset to Aramco Digital, accelerating its digital transformation agenda aligned with Vision 2030's Human Capability Development Program priorities.

experience.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Acting Technical Lead)
experience.description:
Led end-to-end delivery of a core payments module serving 40,000+ active users, reducing transaction failure rate by 35% within 3 months post-launch via robust Node.js microservices and AWS Lambda orchestration.
Built and mentored a 4-engineer squad, instituting code-review standards and automated testing practices that increased sprint velocity by 28% over two quarters.
Architected a React-based customer dashboard that cut average user session drop-off by 22%, directly contributing to a 15% increase in product engagement metrics.
Deployed Python-based data pipeline on AWS (S3 + RDS) processing 1M+ daily financial records with 99.95% uptime SLA, enabling real-time compliance reporting for SAMA regulatory requirements.
Owned CI/CD pipeline redesign using GitHub Actions, reducing mean deployment time from 45 minutes to under 8 minutes and eliminating 90% of manual release errors.

experience.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
experience.description:
Delivered 3 major product features in the first 6 months, contributing to a 20% growth in the platform's registered merchant base.
Developed RESTful APIs in Node.js that handled peak loads of 5,000 concurrent requests with sub-200ms response time, supporting Black Friday campaign traffic spikes.
Migrated legacy monolithic front-end to a modular React architecture, reducing page load time by 40% and improving Lighthouse performance score from 54 to 89.
Collaborated with product and design teams to ship 12 A/B-tested UI iterations, lifting conversion rates on the onboarding flow by 18% over two quarters.
